'''竏噐-ng-g-m''' ('''kayangemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jazzify|jazzify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-ng-g-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jazzify|jazzify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏噐-ng-g-m
|-
! Lemma
| kayangemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyangemoko|thiyangemoko]] || [[word:jiyangemoko|jiyangemoko]] || [[word:shiyangemoko|shiyangemoko]] || [[word:kiyangemoko|kiyangemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyangemoko|thuthuyangemoko]] || [[word:jujuyangemoko|jujuyangemoko]] || [[word:shushuyangemoko|shushuyangemoko]] || [[word:kukuyangemoko|kukuyangemoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyangemoko|thoyangemoko]] || [[word:joyangemoko|joyangemoko]] || [[word:shoyangemoko|shoyangemoko]] || [[word:koyangemoko|koyangemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦyangemoko|thﾃｦyangemoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦyangemoko|jﾃｦyangemoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦyangemoko|shﾃｦyangemoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦyangemoko|kﾃｦyangemoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|}
